positive: A vibrant, mystical forest scene viewed through a geometric, stained-glass window. The main subject is a stylized glowing crescent moon and two intertwined deer silhouettes leaping in a meadow of abstract flora. Use bold, contrasting colors like deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and rich gold accents. The composition must be centered, symmetrical, and suitable for a repeating print pattern. Style: Modern folk-art tattoo flash combined with Art Deco geometrics. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting giving everything a glowing, ethereal rim-light effect. Composition details: Clean vector lines, high contrast, and strong negative space, ensuring the artwork translates well to apparel fabric. Print-ready, maximalist yet balanced.
